target.profile_source: rch Criterion profile of fj-api API overhead
target.why_hot: The deep value_and_grad shared path runs 200 scalar Add/Mul equations through fj-ad forward tape recording and reverse adjoint accumulation.

change.summary: Replace internal BTreeMap<VarId, Value> storage in fj-ad forward env and reverse adjoints with a dense VarId-indexed store when all Jaxpr VarIds fit under a bounded slot threshold, retaining the prior BTreeMap path for sparse or huge VarIds.
change.fallback: Sparse BTreeMap path is used if max VarId overflows usize+1 or exceeds the dense slot limit.

original_profile.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-api-profile-pass25 cargo bench -p fj-api --bench api_overhead -- --sample-size 40 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1

same_worker_baseline.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-api-baseline-pass25-vmi1149989-attempt cargo bench -p fj-api --bench api_overhead -- value_and_grad_runtime/shared/deep_100_nodes --sample-size 40 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1
same_worker_baseline.notes: Measured with the pass-25 patch temporarily reversed.

same_worker_after.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-api-rebench-pass25-final cargo bench -p fj-api --bench api_overhead -- value_and_grad_runtime/shared/deep_100_nodes --sample-size 40 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1

cross_worker_observations.note: Early after run before the final get_mut guard; not used for keep/drop because no same-worker baseline was captured.
Final patch after run; consistent with the earlier vmi1149989 after measurement but not used for keep/drop without a matching baseline.
Temporary reversed-patch baseline; not paired because the immediate after run selected a different worker.

isomorphism_proof.ordering_preserved: Forward still iterates equations in source order, tape entries are still replayed in reverse insertion order, and gradients are emitted in jaxpr.invars order.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking_unchanged: No sort, top-k, or comparator path changes. Cotangent routing remains driven by tape entry input/output order, not map iteration.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: Primitive evaluation, VJP calls, and duplicate-cotangent accumulation order are unchanged; dense add_or_insert still computes value_add(existing, cotangent), matching the previous occupied BTreeMap path.
isomorphism_proof.rng: No RNG state or random sampling is involved in this fj-ad path.
isomorphism_proof.sparse_fallback: Huge or sparse VarId spaces keep the previous BTreeMap behavior.

validation.result: exit 1; pre-existing broad fj-ad panic/index inventories remain, but the new dense-store direct-index finding was removed by using get_mut

validation.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-ad-check-pass25-final cargo check -p fj-ad --all-targets
RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-ad-clippy-pass25-final cargo clippy -p fj-ad --all-targets --no-deps -- -D warnings
RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-ad-test-pass25-final cargo test -p fj-ad --lib -- --nocapture
